Title: Instructions to set up your account
Choose your Training Modality
Body: RefillCourses is fully self-paced. Move through each block in order and your progress saves automatically.

Title: Discussion Forum
Body: Every block has a discussion thread. Post a question and see how other learners approached the same task.

Title: Module 1: Why Digitalize?
Body: Digitalizing your business means meeting customers where they already are: online.

Title: Task 1: Where are you in your digital journey?
Body: Write down where your business is today. This baseline is your starting point.

Title: Module 2: Building an online presence
Body: Your online presence is how customers find and trust you before they ever talk to you.

Title: Module 2 (continued)
Body: Consistency builds trust. Use the same name, logo, and contact details everywhere.

Title: Task 2: Build your online presence
Body: Create or clean up one profile this week. Add three photos and your hours.

Title: Module 3: Selling online
Body: Selling online is about removing friction: clear prices, easy ordering, familiar payment.

Title: Task 3: Create your e-commerce listing
Body: List three products with a photo, price, and one-line description.

Title: Module 4: Adapting other business processes
Body: Digital tools can handle bookkeeping, inventory, and follow-up. Start with your biggest time-waster.

Title: Task 4: Adapt one business process
Body: Move one manual process to a simple digital tool and note the time it saves.

Title: Module 5: What's next
Body: You've built a presence, started selling, and digitalized a process. Now plan to keep going.

Title: Task 5: Action Plan
Body: Write three things you'll do in the next 30 days, each with a date.
